User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Allow all public pages
Allow: /properties
Allow: /properties/
Allow: /contact
Allow: /about
Allow: /blog

# Block admin areas, authentication, and API endpoints
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /auth
Disallow: /auth/

# Sitemap location (dynamic — always up to date with all property listings)
Sitemap: https://primeaddiset.com/sitemap.xml
